mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fixed_visitor_vehicle (user_id, vehicle_number, visitor_name, purpose, start_date, end_date, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{vehicleNumber}, #{visitorName}, #{purpose}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fixed_visitor_vehicle WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
AND vehicle_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vehicleNumber}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE fixed_visitor_vehicle SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE fixed_id = #{fixedId}
mapper.select: SELECT fixed_id, user_id, vehicle_number, visitor_name, purpose, start_date, end_date, created_at, is_deleted, deleted_at FROM fixed_visitor_vehicle WHERE fixed_id = #{fixedId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fixed_visitor_vehicle WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND end_date IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fixed_visitor_vehicle WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
